name: Channel Guard
description: Restrict who can start new messages (root posts) per channel. Everyone else can only reply within threads. Configure each channel directly with /channel-guard.

settings_schema.header:
Channel Guard restricts who can start NEW messages (root posts) per channel. Replies within threads always stay open.

Configure per channel from inside the channel:
  /channel-guard enable
  /channel-guard add @alice @bob
  /channel-guard list

Only System Admins and Channel Admins can run the configuration commands.
settings_schema.footer: These settings apply to every channel that has Channel Guard enabled.

settings.help_text: Allow bot accounts and incoming webhooks to start new messages regardless of the per-channel allowed list.
Shown to users who are not allowed to start a new message. Each channel can override this in the future; for now the global value applies.
settings.default: Only authorized members can start new messages in this channel. You can still reply within existing threads.
